title: NIMHANS Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Technical Support II Posts
description: The National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences (NIMHANS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of various Project Technical Support II Jobs. Those candidates who have completed their 12th, Diploma, or any degree can use this chance and apply for the NIMHANS Notification 2026 . Here we included more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for mo...
